notifications.title: Welcome to Newburgh Ella!
notifications.message: Your room 205 is ready. We hope you have a wonderful stay. Let us know if there is anything we can do to make your anniversary extra special.

notifications.title: Transfer Completed
notifications.message: Your airport transfer has been completed. Welcome to Newburgh Ella!

notifications.title: Room Makeup Completed
notifications.message: Your room has been freshened up and is ready for you. We also left a small anniversary surprise.

notifications.title: Spa Booking Confirmed
notifications.message: Your Deep Tissue Massage for 2 is confirmed for today at 15:00. Please arrive 10 minutes early.

notifications.title: Spa Treatment Completed
notifications.message: We hope you enjoyed your Deep Tissue Massage. Your feedback is always welcome.

notifications.title: Complaint Update — CMP-SEED-002
notifications.message: Our F&B Manager is reviewing your feedback about breakfast delivery. We will respond within 2 hours.

notifications.title: Folio Update
notifications.message: Your in-room dining order of Rs. 5,600 has been added to your folio. Current balance: Rs. 45,700.

notifications.title: Laundry Collected
notifications.message: Your laundry (6 items) has been collected and is being processed. Expected return: tomorrow by 18:00.

notifications.title: Wake-Up Call Scheduled
notifications.message: Your wake-up call is set for tomorrow (17 Mar) at 06:30. Good night!

notifications.title: Exclusive Offer — Ella Wellness Escape
notifications.message: Enjoy 20% off all spa treatments this April. Book before checkout to lock in the rate.
